public_usage_policy.vehicle_telematics_public: used as a telemetry-noise and startup-reference dataset; not inserted directly as evaluation ground truth
public_usage_policy.bus_fuel_sensors_public: used as a heavy-vehicle fuel-consumption reference for derived fuel traces; not inserted directly as route ground truth
public_usage_policy.geolife_public_route: inserted as clean route geometry and timestamp ground truth after schema mapping; fuel and truck identifiers remain derived for thesis simulation
